programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $25/$50 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 3
programme.desc: WPT Champion David Baker has found himself in a bit of a hole, but he is not ready to walk away just yet.
programme.sub-title: WPT Cash Game $25/$50 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 3

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $25/$50 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 4
programme.desc: In the final leg of this series of WPT high-stakes cash, David Baker is finding every possible way to involve himself in big pots to try and recover from his losses earlier in the day.
programme.sub-title: WPT Cash Game $25/$50 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 4

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic 2022 - Part 1
programme.desc: WPT Champion Moshin Charnia has his sights set on winning the WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic for the second time.
programme.sub-title: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic 2022 - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic 2022 - Part 2
programme.desc: Five remain in the fight for the title of WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic Champion and a cash prize of over $1 million dollars.
programme.sub-title: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic 2022 - Part 2

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic 2022 - Part 3
programme.desc: The historic WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic nears an end as only four remain in the battle for $1.2 million dollars and the title of WPT Champion.
programme.sub-title: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic 2022 - Part 3

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic 2022 - Part 4
programme.desc: It's the final table of the prestigious WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic at the Bellagio Hotel and Casino.
programme.sub-title: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic 2022 - Part 4

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $100/$200 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 1
programme.desc: WPT has invited a star-studded lineup to this high-stakes cash game showdown.
programme.sub-title: WPT Cash Game $100/$200 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $100/$200 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 2
programme.desc: The Godfather of Poker, Doyle Brunson, is once again proving why he is considered one of the best to ever play the game.
programme.sub-title: WPT Cash Game $100/$200 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 2

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $100/$200 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 3
programme.desc: The man with the most WPT titles all-time, Darren Elias is putting his table mates to the test on this episode of WPT's high-stakes cash game.
programme.sub-title: WPT Cash Game $100/$200 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 3

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $100/$200 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 4
programme.desc: World-famous DJ Steve Aoki has joined the table in place of Brad Owen and Steve is more than ready to gamble.
programme.sub-title: WPT Cash Game $100/$200 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 4

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $100/$200 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 5
programme.desc: The high-stakes action is heating up at this table full of stars on and off the felt.
programme.sub-title: WPT Cash Game $100/$200 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 5

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Cash Game $100/$200 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 6
programme.desc: This episode of WPT high stakes cash has all of the entertainment that you would expect from such a high-profile cast that includes the likes of Maria Ho, Steve Aoki, Darren Elias, Andrew Neeme, Ema Zajmovic, and Bryan Ercolano.
programme.sub-title: WPT Cash Game $100/$200 No Limit Holdem 2022 - Part 6

programme.title: World Poker Tour: The $200 Thousand Club WPT TV Challenge 2022 - Part 1
programme.desc: ClubWPT hosts the largest ClubWPT event in history. The World Poker Tour on Bally's Sports brings you the final table where six players remain to battle it out.
programme.sub-title: The $200 Thousand Club WPT TV Challenge 2022 - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: The $200 Thousand Club WPT TV Challenge 2022 - Part 2
programme.desc: Six talented ClubWPT players continue to battle at the final table with their eye on the first-place prize of $50,000.
programme.sub-title: The $200 Thousand Club WPT TV Challenge 2022 - Part 2

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT 20 - Part 1
programme.desc: In honor of the 20th anniversary of the World Poker Tour WPT presents a very special episode featuring the greatest moments in WPT poker history over the past 20 seasons.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT 20 - Part 2
programme.desc: In honor of the 20th anniversary of the World Poker Tour WPT presents a very special episode featuring the greatest moments in WPT poker history over the past 20 seasons.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw - Part 1
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw - Part 2
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw - Part 3
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stolthet før fallet
programme.desc: Dylan oppdager at kjæresten til Beka var Drago Musevini, og han brukte Bekas DNA til å skape Nietzscheans.

programme.title: Andromeda: Måneskinn blir deg
programme.desc: Beka og Rhade finner en test som enten gir dem stor rikdom eller driver dem til galskap.

programme.title: Andromeda: Fortiden er Prolix
programme.desc: Harper oppdager et program som kan ødelegge åtte av Seefra-planetene og drepe millioner.

programme.title: Andromeda: Motstandene av tiltrekning
programme.desc: Mens Harper jobber på en måte å redde Seefra-systemet, smyger en spion ombord Andromeda og angriper Beka.

programme.title: Andromeda: Sparer lys fra en svart sol
programme.desc: Det blir gjort et forsøk på å fikse den blinkende solen til Seefra, men Trance blir erstattet av en dobbeltganger.
programme.sub-title: Sparer lys fra en svart sol

programme.title: Andromeda: Total tilbakekalling
programme.desc: Når Dylan er hardt skadet i en laboratorieeksplosjon, reiser han gjennom en rekke alternative virkeligheter.

programme.title: Andromeda: Quantum Tractate Delirium
programme.desc: Rommie blir ombygd for å hjelpe til med å evakuere Seefra-systemet.

programme.title: Andromeda: En dag til - Lys
programme.desc: En krigsherre overbeviser sine tilhengere om at den nærliggende ødeleggelsen av de ytre planetene er et komplott for å gjøre det lettere å plyndre planeten deres.

programme.title: Andromeda: Kaos og stillheten i det
programme.desc: Dylan, Rhade og Beka jobber sammen for å redde Trance fra Methus-2 og Harper fra general Burma.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjertet av reisen (del 1)
programme.desc: Mannskapet gjør det endelig ut av Seefra-systemet og oppdager at Dylan er den siste Paradine.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjertet av reisen (del 2)
programme.desc: Den siste kampen for å redde New Systems Commonwealth begynner.

programme.title: Andromeda: Under natten
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt igjen strandet i nærheten av et svart hull, blir kaptein Dylan Hunt oppdaget av et leiesoldat bergingsskip og finner at han har vært frossen i tide i 300 år.

programme.title: Andromeda: En bekreftende flamme
programme.desc: Dylan beskytter Andromeda mot leiesoldater mens Beka begynner å lure på om de kjemper for feil side.

programme.title: Andromeda: Å miste den skjebnesvangre lynet
programme.desc: Dylan finner en romstasjon full av barn som tror at han er der for å bringe fred ved å drepe fiendene sine.

programme.title: Andromeda: D Minus Zero
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet lærer fremdeles hvordan de skal samarbeide ettersom de blir angrepet av restauratørene.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dobbel helix
programme.desc: Andromeda blir involvert i en strid mellom en enn planeten og en Nietzschean-koloni.

programme.title: Andromeda: Angel Dark, Demon Bright
programme.desc: En slipstream sender Andromeda tilbake i tid til like før Commonwealth faller. Mannskapet må gripe inn for å bevare historien

programme.title: Andromeda: Slipsene som blinder
programme.desc: Besvarelse av et nødanrop fører til at mannskapet henter Bekas bror, nå en Wayist, og hans venn.

programme.title: Andromeda: Bankene til Lethe
programme.desc: Et svart hull lar Dylan kommunisere med sin tidligere forlovede, 300 år tidligere.

programme.title: Andromeda: En rose i asken
programme.desc: Dylan er fengslet på en fengselsplanet og må utføre en flukt mens mannskapet hans prøver å redde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Alle store Neptuns hav
programme.desc: Castalian styrer Andromeda for å fullføre charteret for det nye samveldet. Når lederen blir oppdaget død, er Tyr hovedmistenkt.

programme.title: MTV Catfish
programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: When a car was found in a drainage ditch with two bodies inside, a fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turned up dead and the prime suspect was her boyfriend. When he was eventually cleared, investigators had to dig deeper to find the perpetrator. With the help of a forensic geologist, they identified the most unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: One warm summer afternoon, the town of Verona, Wisconsin faced its first triple homicide. To solve the case, investigators had to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: The driver said he couldn't have hit and killed a pedestrian on a Harrisburg street. The Jeep Grand Cherokee he was leasing around that time had been sold months ago to a buyer in another state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a popular young man, investigators faced the daunting task of searching for one boat among 1200 others.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man was killed in a mysterious car crash, but the evidence at the scene led investigators to believe it was not an accident. Forensic science revealed what really happened and the truth devastated three families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue ? a flaw on a mailing envelope ? exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Maneuver
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run accident claimed the life of a high school athlete, everyone in town mourned his passing. Finding the killer was a long shot at best.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: Lives changed in the 20 years following an unsolved murder, and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A lifelong resident of the tiny town of Lefroy, Tasmania was murdered outside his own home. Robbery appeared to be the motive, but with no suspects, the investigation came to a halt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite died after falling down the stairs, witness accounts contradicted evidence. To find out what really happened, investigators employed a physicist and an expert in accident reconstruction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired-Up
programme.desc: In 1996, Derrick Duehren returned to find his Oregon home burned to the ground. His wife's charred remains were later found in the rubble. Investigators set out to determine if it was an unfortunate accident or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Repairman Death, Hero Molester, White Bird, Heads Up, Update: Mary and Martha and Nazi's Lazarus.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 13

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 15

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 16
programme.desc: This episode includes: Who Killed Jeanine? (Pts. 1 & 2), Animal Saviors, Bus Stop Amnesia, Point Blank and Miriam's Memory.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 17
programme.desc: This episode includes: Murder in Agawam, Murdered Mom, Missing Baby, Dropped Off Doe, Hotel Balcony Death, She Sold Babies and Genius Mystery.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 18

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 19
programme.desc: This episode includes: Honeymoon Isle, Little Girl Lost, Bible Code, Update: Molester Cop, Bee Sting Healing and Surprise Sister.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 20
programme.desc: This episode includes: Born to Kill, Carnies, Children's Past Lives, Update: I.D. Swap, Sadd Fugitive and Nine Lives.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 21
programme.desc: This episode includes: Picture Taking Fugitive, John Burns, Deputy Death, Honky Tonk Woman, Update: Sharon's Search and Coma Healer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 1
programme.desc: Unsolved Mysteries covers crimes, paranormal events, tales of lost love, UFO's, and unexplained history. This episode includes: Thumbs & Update, Marsh & Update, Conway, Honeymoon Bones and Dottie.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 2
programme.desc: Unsolved Mysteries covers crimes, paranormal events, tales of lost love, UFO's, and unexplained history. This episode: Badlands & Update, Sixty Miles, McFall and Mail Call & Update.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 3
programme.desc: Unsolved Mysteries covers crimes, paranormal events, tales of lost love, UFO's, and unexplained history. This Episode: Amnesia & Update, Carlucci & Update, Math Teacher Escape & Update and Beale's Cypher.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Queen Mary Ghost Ship, Update: Carlucci, Two Strikes & UD and Personals Parts 1 & 2 & Update.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: D.B. Cooper Parts 1 & 2, Update: Math Teacher Escape, Friends to the End & Update and Babe's Uniform & Update.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Son of Sam Pt. 1, Mystery Cowboy, Slain Swain & Update, and Update: Badlands.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 7

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 8

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Halloween Party Death, Father/Son & UD, Priest Killer and Rock of Fortune.

programme.desc: En 24/7 kanal for folk som er nyskjerrige på mote og design! Supermodellen Heidi Klum er vert for denne spennende reality-serien som gir sultne, talentfulle designere sjansen til å vise frem sitt arbeid for New York.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Vanished
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Unlawful Flight
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Murdering Cowboy
programme.desc: The sun set on the Wild West long ago, but some people refused to notice. Claude Dallas was one of them. A wily trapper, Dallas typified the rugged individualism that forged this country. He went too far when he killed two game wardens in 1981.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In the Camera's Eye
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Natural Witness
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Absent Witness
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Medical Examiners's Casebook
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims. And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder. These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Killers
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Body Count
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Obsessions
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Abduction
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear, kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Identity
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Hidden Obsessions
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives: At Close Range
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Collective Justice
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Crooked House
programme.desc: Deep in Cheshire Ghost Dimension explore a house full of ghostly activity and paranormal goings on. Used to house troops during WW2 as a medical unit.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Barn
programme.desc: Something Strange is haunting the remains of a colliery in Cheshire and Ghost Dimension head in to uncover the truth behind the activity!

programme.title: Past Hunters: Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: The Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker is a former government-owned nuclear bunker located at Hack Green, Cheshire, England. It Started as a decoy site for enemy bombers but later developed into a legitimate base. Now it is ripe with hauntings.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Tutbury Castle
programme.desc: The team head to Tutbury Castle in Derbyshire to investigate the paranormal reports at the location. Past Hunters appear to have caught the Tutbury Ghost on camera.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Haunted and Cursed Magpie Mines
programme.desc: Haunted Magpie Mines are located in the Peak District of Derbyshire. Believed to be one of the most paranormal mines in the UK. Will a ghost be caught on camera? and will any of the paranormal equipment make contact with the spirit world?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Lost Souls Of The Tivoli Venue
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team travels to North Wales and the Tivoli Theatre in Flint for a night of haunting entertainment.
programme.sub-title: Lost Souls Of The Tivoli Venue

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Strange Things at Owd Betts
programme.desc: Sean heads to Rochdale and investigates strange paranormal reports at Owd Betts. Something spooky lurks in the basement and it seems Sean is not alone as he investigates the main bar.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Carnfield Hall
programme.desc: Carnfield Hall is a country house dating from the 15th and 16th Centuries. This private residence turn event hall is using its paranormal activity to draw in business. Are these spirits the old residents?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Ashton-Under-Lyne to investigate poltergeist activity claims in a local pub. It's believed that it's not just the locals that return to haunt here. Sean comes face to face with the activity in a night he will never forget.
programme.sub-title: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at The Station Hotel and it appears his presence is not welcomed by the spirits. This is one experience of the paranormal that leaves a mark in Sean's memory forever.
programme.sub-title: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to a haunted escape room attraction and although the sets are dressed to scare, something more sinister seems to be lurking here. Will Sean escape unscathed tonight?
programme.sub-title: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the escape rooms and investigates the haunted bible and radio. Prepare for a fright when Sean and Paul join forces and witness paranormal activity firsthand
programme.sub-title: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Evil Spirit in the Cave
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension face a dark sinister ghost inside haunted Caves. Crank caves based in St Helens are said to be the most haunted in the area. Strange paranormal spirits spooky anyone that ventures inside.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: High Spirits at The Gothic Mansion
programme.desc: Bex and Sean investigate a haunting inside a gothic mansion, that is said to be haunted by the former owner of the building.
programme.sub-title: High Spirits at The Gothic Mansion

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Spirits Flying High at Speke Aerodrome
programme.desc: The team head to Speke Airport to investigate claims that some of the aircraft located there have ghostly passengers still aboard, waiting to take flight.
programme.sub-title: Spirits Flying High at Speke Aerodrome

programme.title: Past Hunters: The Block
programme.desc: The team investigate a disused factory in Burton-Upon-Trent. Reports of paranormal happenings are common and the team are ready for anything.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: WW2 Hospital Haunting
programme.desc: Built in the early 1900’s and now used as offices, a former world war hospital has become the new home for something supernatural. Strange voices, eerie footsteps and the sounds of painful screams have all been reported. What will be uncovered tonight?

programme.title: Past Hunters: The Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters travel to Hull to investigate ghostly goings on inside of a former chocolate factory. The investigation turns out to be no picnic, as the ghosts haunting make direct contact with the team.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Man with a Cane
programme.desc: The team head to Bolton and investigate the Old Three Crowns. Haunted by the spirit of a very angry man with a deadly cane and an upset, young, ghostly girl, will they uncover why the girl is so upset? And could they encounter the angry spirit man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody
programme.desc: On today's Steve Wilkos, will the lie detector results reveal if Tamisha and Simone's men were faithful? Or will it reveal some more sinister results?
programme.sub-title: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The Devastating Truth
programme.desc: Desiaree refuses to believe her sister or mother's accusations against her father. Are their lies are keeping him in prison? Find out today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Lagraciala tragically lost her ten month old son and cremated him, but after a serious fight with her fiancée AJ, she couldn't find the ashes. AJ admits to threatening to steal the ashes, but denies he took them!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
programme.desc: Scott and Dawn want their sister Betty to leave her boyfriend Michael because he's allegedly violent. The drama will explode when Scott confronts Michael on our stage today!
programme.sub-title: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Statement
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Vanessa reveals a secret she's been hiding from her boyfriend and Joel takes a DNA test to determine if he fathered Melissa's son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Ever Have My Baby?
programme.desc: Since he never saw evidence of her pregnancy, Robert is here to find out if his ex-girlfriend Sara was ever pregnant with their child. What will his lie detector results reveal?
programme.sub-title: Did You Ever Have My Baby?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Chose the Molester Over Your Kids
programme.desc: Jackie’s family doesn't trust her boyfriend around her children, but she insists on staying with him. What horrible truth will Shaqualla's lie detector test reveal about her man?
programme.sub-title: You Chose the Molester Over Your Kids

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?
programme.desc: Are Tracy and Latonia's men leading secret double lives with other men? What will the lie detector test results reveal about Kanecha and Mike?
programme.sub-title: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA Shockers
programme.desc: Monique and Ashley find out who their newborn babies' fathers are on today's Steve Wilkos Show!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: This Should Be Explosive...
programme.desc: Katrina believes her sister Kendra’s boyfriend is a cheater and having sex with her best friend Nay-Nay! Later, John returns to the stage with a shocking update!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do You Need a Medic or Are You Guilty?
programme.desc: Michelle needs answers about who hurt her daughter. She will stop at nothing to protect her baby. Will the father James clear his name on Steve's stage?
programme.sub-title: Do You Need a Medic or Are You Guilty?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: Don't Run From the Results
programme.desc: Roberta suspects that her husband Bryan has been cheating. They both believe the other is cheating. Find out whether these men are really the father on today's Steve Wilkos!
programme.sub-title: DNA: Don't Run From the Results

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
programme.desc: Shannan claims Tim fathered her child. He doesn't buy it because he doesn't recall having sex with her! Later, Ayana is furious that her boyfriend Patrick denies their son!
programme.sub-title: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
programme.desc: Is Khadisa's boyfriend Chad cheating on her with her own sister? Will Maya's ex trust her and her current beau with their infant son?
programme.sub-title: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
programme.desc: Will Nadia and Woody's lie detector test results prove that they were negligent and deserved to lose custody of their children? Then, can Steve set the record straight about Josette's daughter?
programme.sub-title: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The 1,000th Episode!
programme.desc: On the 1,000th episode, we'll bring you all of the crazy confessions, explosive meltdowns, chair throws, funny moments and the heartfelt stories that have made this show special!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Saw Right Through You
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Maurice wants to prove to his girlfriend that he's faithful. Plus Chuanhtee says fed up with Ladi's cheating accusations! Watch as the truth is revealed!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Have Two Husbands
programme.desc: Jessica married Gian after a five-month relationship. With a baby on the way, everything seems to be going great for the couple, except Jessica is married to another man, Michael!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: An Explosive DNA Story
programme.desc: Teneal and Richard are telling different tales, each alleging the other is unfit to parent! The truth will come down to a lie detector test, and the results will be shocking!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.
programme.desc: Today Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions. Steven offers a number of excuses for not seeing his son, but can he redeem himself?
programme.sub-title: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Two years ago, Latisha and her boyfriend were found shot to death in their car. Latisha’s mother Nancy believes her ex-husband Kenneth was involved. Who is responsible for their deaths?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant
programme.desc: Megan is 14 and pregnant with 19 year old Michael’s baby, but he doesn’t see any problems with this situation. Laurie, Megan’s mother, turns to Steve to help get through to her!
programme.sub-title: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: Kenda encounters one of the most horrendous crime scenes of his career, but his hunt for a homicidal maniac leads him to the most unexpected of killers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. LA
programme.desc: A young man tries to flee a violent scene, but is shot dead behind the wheel of his car. A peculiar clue puts Kenda hot on the heels of a self-styled gangster with revenge on his mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Collision Course
programme.desc: Two best friends are gunned down on a dark residential street. When a string of disappointments threaten to derail the case, Kenda enlists the help of an old acquaintance.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bump In the Night
programme.desc: When a pretty, young pilot is found in bed, bound and with a bullet in her head, Lt. Joe Kenda must determine if this was a random assault or payback for something that happened in the skies.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Man Falling
programme.desc: When a family of four is brutally murdered, it sends a shockwave of fear through the town. Police believe they have a spree killer on their hands, until Lt. Joe Kenda discovers a gruesome connection.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: the corpse of a man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: With Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home. Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood On the Tracks
programme.desc: When an unsuspecting train conductor discovers a decapitated body on a lonely stretch of track, Lt. Joe Kenda must unravel the mystery of his death.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Make My Day
programme.desc: When Keith Andrews is killed, a man steps forward claiming he did it in self-defense—but Lt. Joe Kenda has his doubts.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: .357 Magnum
programme.desc: The murder of a popular teen at a crowded house party sends Kenda down a winding road paved with lies, misdirection, and innuendo.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shot Through the Heart
programme.desc: 15yr old Chuck returns home from school to find his mother, Betty Limbrick, shot dead on the floor. Evidence points to a robbery gone wrong, but Kenda uncovers a plot almost too shocking to believe.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Victim Zero
programme.desc: A brawl erupts at a local bar ends with the shooting death of a army solider. To unravel the murder, Lt. Joe Kenda most infiltrate a revered military institution, and expose a dangerous vendetta.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Now Pronounce You Dead
programme.desc: Mother of 3 Dianne Hood is shot to death by a masked gunman on her way home from a Lupus support meeting. Joe Kenda uncovers a sordid web of lust and greed, revealing a killer no one ever expected.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Time Heals Not Some Things
programme.desc: Heidi og Spencer søker hjelp for sin finansielle situasjon. Mens Kaitlynns nye forhold fortsetter å blomstre, truer en av Brandons gamle flørter å ødelegge ting mellom ham og Dani. Justin og faren blir kjent igjen etter en vanskelig tid.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: That's Math Right There
programme.desc: Kaitlynns avgjørelse om å flytte inn med kjæresten får alle til å lure på hva som skjer. Heidi & Spencer bekymrer seg for selskapet. Brandon revurderer forholdet sitt, mens Audrina får en vekker angående Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: What About Me?
programme.desc: På Speidis velværeanstalt går det rykter om at Kaitlynn er gravid. Brandon avslører sjokkerenede nyheter om forholdet. Familien Wahlers kamp for å slutte fred med familien Pratt, blir distrahert av mulige skjellsettende forandringer for egen del.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Timing Is Everything
programme.desc: Kaitlynn knekker nyheten om sin graviditet til Brody, men er urolig når han og Kris skal møtes på fristedet. Pratt- og Wahler-gjengen håndterer endelig feiden som har delt gruppen. Justin får lære viktigheten av å vedlikeholde kontakter.

programme.title: The Hills: New City, New Drama
programme.desc: Når Lauren Conrad må mestre både moteskolen, en krevende praktikantjobb og en uforutsigbar romkamerat som ødelegger for henne, forstår hun raskt at alt er stort i Los Angeles, også hennes egne problemer.

programme.title: The Hills: A Change of Plans
programme.desc: Når Heidi fikser et intervju for drømmejobben som får henne til å overveie å hoppe av skolen permanent, forstår Lauren at hun og Heidi kanskje har helt forskjellige mål.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Call
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sender Lauren på et oppdrag til New York City, men vel tilbake i L.A. venter det henne en stor overraskelse fra fortiden. Heidi skjønner at å jobbe med festreklamering ikke bare er en fest.

programme.title: The Hills: Lauren and Jason: Part 2
programme.desc: Da Jason, Laurens eksflamme fra Laguna Beach, dukker opp igjen i livet hennes, forstår hun at hun kanskje ikke er så ferdig med ham som hun trodde. Samtidig, i sin nye jobb, spør Heidi seg om det egentlig er verdt alt strevet.

programme.title: The Hills: Jason's Birthday
programme.desc: Lauren haster hjem fra en lang Teen Vogue-event for å være sammen med Jason på bursdagen hans, men kvelden blir ikke som forventet. Audrina ber Heidi om råd rundt hennes nyeste date, modellen og skuespilleren Danny.

programme.title: The Hills: Boyfriends and Work Don't Mix
programme.desc: Jason utvikler seg til å bli et forstyrrende moment i Laurens profesjonelle og akademiske liv. Heidi får endelig mulighet til å jobbe i nattklubbene, men tidspunktet kunne ikke ha vært dårligere.

programme.title: The Hills: Somebody Always Has to Cry
programme.desc: Det er gjengens første ferie i L.A. og ikke alle får det de ønsket seg. Et nyttårskyss skal vise seg å bli litt av en oppgave for Lauren, når Jason finner ut at hun fikk en uventet telefon fra en gammel flamme.

programme.title: The Hills: You Can't Just Be With Me?
programme.desc: Jason vil gjerne gjøre Laurens 20-årsdag spesiell, men når hun lyver for ham angående en jobb med mannelige modeller for et Teen Vogue-oppdrag, settes forholdet deres på prøve.
programme.sub-title: You Can't Just Be With Me?

programme.title: The Hills: Love is Not a Maybe Thing
programme.desc: Heidi bestemmer endelig at hun har opplevd nok dramatikk med Jordan. Lauren og Jason tenker på å gå et hakk videre.
programme.sub-title: Love is Not a Maybe Thing

programme.title: The Hills: Timing is Everything
programme.desc: Når Laurens harde jobbing under moteuken i L.A. fører til tidenes største karrieremulighet, føler hun seg dradd mellom jobben sin og kjæresten sin.

programme.title: The Hills: Out With The Old
programme.desc: Etter en vaklevoren sommer med kjæresten Jason, bestemmer Lauren seg for å gjøre det slutt og drar tilbake til Teen Vogue for å møte sin mindre glade sjef. Heidi får problemer med en fyr som både hun og Audrina dater.

programme.title: The Hills: When You Least Expect It
programme.desc: Lauren går på sin første date siden Jason, og blir satt på prøve på jobben når hun bes om å gjøre sitt første moteshow. Heidi har en livsavgjørende hemmelighet hun må fortelle om til kjæresten sin.

programme.title: The Hills: The Best Night Ever
programme.desc: Når Audrina dukker opp i Heidis bursdag uten invitasjon, forstår hun at Heidi ikke er villig til å tilgi og glemme. Lauren, som har bestemt seg for å konsentrere seg om jobben, blir forført av sjarmen til Brody, den nye typen i livet hennes.

programme.title: The Hills: Who Do You Trust?
programme.desc: Audrina forteller Heidi at Spencer er en lurendreier, men Heidi stiller seg tvilende - til hun ser det med egen øyne. Lauren fortsetter å lure på om hun er klar for et forhold.

programme.title: The Hills: One Big Interruption
programme.desc: Heidi tar en pause fra Spencer, men savner ham mer en hun trodde hun ville. Lauren må planlegge en Teen Vogue-middag, men distraheres når hun må hjelpe praktikanten Emily fra New York.

programme.title: The Hills: You Have Chosen
programme.desc: Når Lauren forteller Heidi hva hun egentlig syns om Spencer, må Heidi velge mellom bestevennen sin og kjæresten.

programme.title: The Hills: With Friends Like These...
programme.desc: Lauren forstår at hun ikke kan stole på bestevennene sine etter at Heidi spleiser Jen med Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: Enough Is Enough
programme.desc: Spencer ber Heidi om å flytte inn hos ham, men Heidi vet ikke hva hun skal gjøre, eller hvordan hun skal fortelle det til samboeren Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills: New Year, New Friends
programme.desc: Laurens 21-årsdag er full av overraskelser - Heidi og Audrina holder selskap for henne. Jen gjør et forsøk på å slutte fred med Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills: Apology Not Accepted
programme.desc: Lauren fyller 21 år og Heidi har store planer for bursdagsfeiringen. Men, rett før festen bestemmer Heidi seg for å fortelle Lauren om Spencers ide om at de skal flytte sammen.

programme.title: The Hills: Goodbye for Now
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen når spenningen sitt toppunkt når Heidi tar et endelig valg angående å flytte sammen med Spencer. Lauren går til Audrina for å fylle tomrommet etter bestevennen sin, og Whitney flyr til New York City til et intervju.

programme.title: The Hills: You Know What You Did
programme.desc: Lauren drar ikke til Heidi og Spencers innflyttingsfest da hun får høre at Heidi har spredd rykter om henne. Men når Lauren og Heidi støter på hverandre, begynner de å krangle verre enn de noen gang har gjort før.

programme.title: The Hills: Big Girls Don't Cry
programme.desc: Lauren og Heidi glir enda lenger fra hverandre når Spencer frir til Heidi. Audrina går inn for sitt forhold med en tidligere kjæreste, og Lauren drar tilbake til Laguna Beach for å rådføre seg.

programme.title: The Hills: Truth And Time Tells All
programme.desc: Lauren hjelper Audrina med å avgjøre om Justin er kjærestemateriale, men Audrina har allerede tatt sitt valg. Heidi forstår at å være forlovet ikke bare er lek og alskens moro.

programme.title: The Hills: Meet The Parents
programme.desc: Slik jeg ser det: Opplev dine yndlingsrealityskuespillere og yndlingssituasjoner - med en komisk vri. Alt og all, fra Lauren til Spencer - ingen eller ingenting er trygge for den ene skuespilleren som alene spiller hver eneste rolle i serien.

programme.title: The Hills: Rolling With The Enemy
programme.desc: Heidis omgangskrets minker når Spencer "slår opp" med Brody fordi han vanker med Lauren. Audrina vil at forholdet til Justin skal være offisielt, men han nekter å binde seg.

programme.title: The Hills: Second Chances
programme.desc: Lauren opplever et pust fra fortiden da hennes ekskjæreste Jason ringer. Heidi konkurrerer med kollegaen Elodie om en forfremmelse på jobben.

programme.title: The Hills: They Meet Again
programme.desc: Laurens følelser for Jason flammer opp igjen, men når de støter på Heidi og Spencer på en restaurant, er det mer som slår gnister. Heidis forfremmelse hos Bolthouse koster henne vennskapet med Elodie.

programme.title: The Hills: For Better Or Worse
programme.desc: Lauren får sjokk da hun får vite at Jason har en kjæreste, men Jason har en enda større overraskelse på lager. Heidi finner ut at Spencer ikke har fortalt sine foreldre om gifteplanene deres.

programme.title: The Hills: What Happens In Vegas...
programme.desc: Gjengen feirer Brodys bursdag i Vegas. Audrinas kjæreste Justin skaper problemer for hennes vennskap med Lauren. Lauren og Brodys tiltrekning til hverandre vokser.

programme.title: The Hills: What Goes Around
programme.desc: Jen Bunney forteller Lauren at Brody startet ryktene om henne, men Brody skylder på Spencer, og Heidi blir stående midt oppi det hele. Lauren ber Audrina om unnskyldning for å ha blandet seg i hennes og Justins forhold.

programme.title: The Hills: No More Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: Lauren begynner en ny romanse med en herremodell, men innser at hun fortsatt er glad i Brody. Spencer er redd for at Heidis nye jobb vil ta henne fra ham.

programme.title: The Hills: Stress And The City
programme.desc: Whitney og Lauren tar en tur til NYC for Teen Vogue, og Spencer henvender seg til Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: Young Hollywood
programme.desc: Whitney og Lauren er med i The Young Hollywood Party, og Heidi feirer sin 21-årsdag.

programme.title: The Hills: Forgive and Forget
programme.desc: Heidi og Lauren krangler nok en gang offentlig, noe som resulterer i at Heidi ber Lauren om unnskyldning for alt som har hendt. Audrinas forhold med Justin går ikke framover, men karrieren hennes hos Epic Records går så det suser.

programme.title: The Hills: With This Ring...
programme.desc: Lauren leker Kirsten Giftekniv når Whitney går på sin første date med sin personlige trener. Spencer er i mot Heidis planer om et eventyrbryllup, og det ender i en krangel som truer hele forholdet deres.

programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Ready For More Baggage?
programme.desc: En ny eks dukker opp med gaver med en overraskende vri. Bryce får hjertesorg og gråter etter sjokkerende nyheter om Nicole. Hemmelighullet tilfører mer bagasje enn huset fikser.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Exes Court is Now In Session
programme.desc: Kyra er splittet; hun må velge Emily eller David. Noe som gjør at en av dem slynges ut i sjalusi. . Mikes eksplosive oppførsel presser Arisce ennå lenger unna. Hemmeligheter avsløres når parene stilles overfor sannhetsbrettet i den endelige dommen.
programme.sub-title: Exes Court is Now In Session

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Something Like The Truth
programme.desc: En eks kommer på verst mulig tid, og snur opp ned på Da'vonne og Alains nye romanse. Hemmelighullet gir anspenthet og gjør at et par stiller spørsmål ved forholdet sitt i syv minutter da de gjennomgår hverandres mobiler.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Where's The Lie?
programme.desc: Derynn havner i hemmelighullet hvor en overraskende gjest gir henne et skikkelig perspektiv på sitt forhold til Ricky. Rays spill avslører ham da Alexis avslører en hemmelighet. Det siste sannhetsbrettet setter alle på pinebenken.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Setting Sail On A Relation-Ship
programme.desc: Sannhetsbrettet skaper uorden og singlene må fatte en siste avgjørelse om de skal forlate øya med eksen eller alene. Hvem vil stå igjen i havnen?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: 8 sexy single håper å finne kjærligheten på en paradisstrand. Men det er en hake, for drømmeferien ødelegges når ekskjærestene deres dukker opp, en etter en. Noen for å få hevn, andre for å få forholdet til å blusse opp igjen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Drømmeferien der 8 single leter etter kjærlighet fortsetter å få sand i maskineriet. Vicky fortsetter sin romanse med Ross. Marcos eks, Frankie, oppdager at hun har en rival. Ash og Chloe kommer til å få seg litt av et sjokk når neste eks dukker opp.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Den fjerde ekskjæresten kommer til stranda og skaper mere trøbbel for de single: Ross får føle Chloes vrede når hans forhold til Vicky utvikler seg. Mellom Taitha og Ash går det for seg og Marco og Frankie når bristepungtet med Emily.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Den femte ekskjæresten ankommer stranden for å overraske Vicky og Ross. Ting blir verre for Talitha og en sjokkerende avreise etterlater alle i panikk for hvilken eks som er den neste til å ankomme.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Ash kunne ikke bli mer sjokkert når den sjette eksen kommer. Emily og Liam drar på daten fra helvete. Farah blir forelsket. Talitha blir redd når en velbevart hemmelighet truer med å bli kjent og ødelegge forholdet til Ash for alltid.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Ross sier til sin eks Chloe at han ønsker å prøve på nytt, og Jack prøver med Emily. Ashs verden forandrer seg når Joss avslører det hemmelige kysset med Talitha, og selvsagt dukker enda en eks opp på stranden.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Ash og Talitha har så vidt rukket å slå opp før han kliner med Chloe. Shelby og Ross kommer nærmere hverandre når de overnatter på en kirkegård. Vicky eks kommer, som hun har gruet seg til, og alt tar av på stranden.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Når Vickys andre eks, Ricci, dukker opp, deles gruppa. Ash klikker på Liam med alvorlige konsekvenser. Dan truer med å klikke på Ricci, og Ricci og Vicky prøver på å få en slags avslutning med liten suksess.
programme.sub-title: Liam's Final Stir Of The Pot

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Zahida Wages War
programme.desc: Åtte sexy single folk oppdager at drømmen om sommerkjærlighet blir til et mareritt når flere ekser kommer for å skape kaos. Zahida kriger med Maisie om Sean, men det er når den første eksen ankommer at det virkelige blodbadet skjer.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: A Sea Of Tears
programme.desc: Det koker i villaen når ikke bare en, men tre ekser ankommer og skaper kaos for turtelduene Ross og Harriette. Zahidas eks Joe mister kontrollen og Alex truer med å drukne seg i tårer.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Harriette's Love Triangle
programme.desc: Singlenes elendighet fortsetter når Sean hopper fra Zahida til Zaralena, og Harriettes kjærlighetstrekant blir verre. Maisie vil at noe skal skje og Aaron fra Geordie Shore gjør spektakulær entré, men hvem av eksene er hans?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Nicole's Nightmare
programme.desc: Det blir spent i villaen når Zaralena får kjenne på Zahidas vrede. Den nye eksen får gutta til å oppføre seg eiersyke. Josh har et godt øye til Nicole, men tar det slutt når hun oppdager en grusom hemmelighet?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: The Blonde Bombshell
programme.desc: Adam avslører sine følelser for Nicole, og Jack og Josh vil ha nytt blod i villaen. Zaralena og Aaron kommer nærmere hverandre, og Ross og Harriette tilbringer natten i loftsleiligheten. Men en ny eks kan ødelegge for dem alle.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Harriette's Hearthache
programme.desc: Terror-nettbrettet gjør livet surt for Becca. Harriettes hjertesorg blir verre og Zaralenas elendighet fortsetter, men det er den nyeste eksen som truer med å skape det verste kaoset.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: The Truth Comes Out
programme.desc: Ankomsten til enda en eks fører til et blodbad i villaen. Nicole må høre sannheten om Jacques Fraser, mens Ross og Harriette krangler igjen. Og Zaralena tar en stor avgjørelse.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Jacques Comeuppance
programme.desc: Jacques Fraser får omsider sin straff. Den nyeste eksen stormer stranden og villaen, skaper splid mellom Sean og Zahida og skaper kaos for resten.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Aaron Moves On
programme.desc: Det kommer to nye ekser, til Aarons glede og Beccas fortvilelse. Maisie treffer bunnen, Harriette får et sammenbrudd, og Sean og Jack barker sammen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: Terror-nettbrettet holder et stort gresk bryllup for Sean og Zahida, men når den siste eksen kommer, blir festen kaotisk. Harriette får en sjokkerende beskjed av Ross.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: iCarly: Missekonkurransen
programme.desc: Sam avslører overfor Carly og Freddie at hun deltok i skjønnhetskonkurranser som liten. Da hun finner ut at hennes rival skal konkurrere i Seattle, overbeviser hun Carly om å stille opp mot henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: Etter at Sam plutselig må i fengsel, lover Carly og Freddie dyrt og hellig å ikke avlyse nettshowet ettersom faren hennes skal se det. Carly ber Spencer om hjelp, men det blir vanskelig, for han skal på date.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: En eksentrisk millionær ber Carly og vennene hennes om å sende det første nettshowet fra det ytre rom, så de må prøves ut for en romreise. Imens besøker en merkelig liten pike Spencer hjemme i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Freddie flytter ut
programme.desc: Freddie bestemmer seg for å flytte ut av leiligheten sin etter at moren hans har gjort ham flau. Carly, Sam og Freddie starter et firma og spesialiserer seg på bilder av kjæledyr.

programme.title: iCarly: iBeat the Heat
programme.desc: Når en hetebølge rammer Seattle og strømmen går, kommer Spencer til unnsetning med et norsk klimaanlegg.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: De medvirkende introduserer bloopers og bortklipte scener fra serien.

programme.title: iCarly: Rommet brenner
programme.desc: Spencer prøver å overraske Carly på bursdagen hennes, men ender opp med å brenne ned rommet hennes. Men når forsikringsselskapet gir ham en stor sjekk, har han sjansen til å gjøre det godt igjen.

programme.title: iCarly: Ja
programme.desc: Etter at en iCarly fan frir til kjæresten på nettshowet, blir gjengen nesten tvunget til å gå i bryllupet. Men når bruden får kalde føtter, må Carly komme til unnsetning.

programme.title: iCarly: T-skjortesalg
programme.desc: Gjengen begynner å selge Penny-skjorter, og når salget går susende, rekrutterer Sam barn fra 4. klasse for å bidra til å lage t-skjorter. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie er uenige om hvordan de skal behandles.

programme.title: iCarly: Rampestreker
programme.desc: Når hun blir ertet for aldri å ha funnet på en morsom spøk, rekrutterer Carly Spencer for å spøke med Sam og Freddie. Men etter at Spencer har fått sansen for det, kan han ikke slutte. Mob må finne en måte å stoppe ham på.

programme.title: iCarly: Moren til Sam
programme.desc: Etter å ha kranglet ned moren sin, flytter Sam inn til Carly, som snart innser at hun er en fryktelig gjest. Freddie blir forfulgt av en farlig kriminell etter å ha fanget ham på film da han begikk en forbrytelse.

programme.title: iCarly: Nevel trenger hjelp
programme.desc: Når en video av Nevel, som skriker til en liten jente, dukker opp på internett, blir Nevel hatet av alle. Men Nevel trygler iCarly-gjengen om hjelp for å redde sin ære.

programme.title: iCarly: Den kjekke assistenten
programme.desc: Carly og Sam ansetter en kjekk fyr som praktikant på nettshowet.

programme.title: iCarly: iOMG
programme.desc: Gjengen tilbringer kvelden med å fullføre sine prosjekter ved Ridgeway under den årlige skole-innlåsingen. Carly og Freddie mistenker at Sam er forelsket i sin nye venn Brad.

programme.title: iCarly: iParty med Victorious
programme.desc: Carly mistenker at den nye typen hennes, Steven, er utro med Tori Vega, så gjengen planlegger en tur til Los Angeles for å ta ham på fersken på en fest som Andre holder i Kenan Thompsons hus.

programme.title: iCarly: Datehjelpen
programme.desc: Carly trår til for å løse en krangel mellom Sam og Freddie. Snart kommer Freddie og Sam til Carly for å få hjelp med hver eneste krangel. Nå som hun har involvert seg, hvordan kan Carly trekke seg ut av det igjen?

programme.title: iCarly: Det holder
programme.desc: Mrs Benson oppdager Sam og Freddies forhold etter at Gibby - som nå er mål for Sams hevn - har lagt planer om å splitte dem. Kommer Carly til å slåss for Sam og Freddie, eller hjelpe Gibby med å få dem til å gå fra hverandre?

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg elsker deg
programme.desc: Carly ber Sam og Freddie om å prøve hverandres yndlingshobbier. I mens treffer Spencer på sin gamle barnevakt og ber henne ut på middag. Etter at de har falt inn i sine gamle roller igjen, kommer de fortsatt til å kunne være sammen?

programme.title: iCarly: iQ
programme.desc: Carly vil imponere en ny fyr ved å prøve å virke smartere enn hun er. Og gjengen prøver å finne et nytt sted å bo til T-Bo, etter at han har blitt kastet ut av Groovy Smoothie.

programme.title: iCarly: Møtet med førstedamen
programme.desc: Et føderalt bureau begynner å undersøke iCarly-gjengen etter at de hacker seg inn på et sikkerhetsnettverk for å holde nettfødselsdag for Carlys far. Gjestestjerne - Michelle Obama.

programme.title: iCarly: Billetten
programme.desc: Gjengen, minus Carly, tar med Sam til Canadian Fat Cake-fabrikken, men oppdager så at Sam ikke får komme tilbake inn i USA. I mens får Carly bekymringer i badekaret når hun gjør seg klar til daten sin.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Yakima
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt disset i et intervju om iCarly, prøver Freddie å vise sin kreative side gjennom å webb-sende iCarly i 3D. Spencer ansetter en assistent som han ikke har råd til å betale.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: Christopher Cane, skuespilleren som spiller Rex on Victorious, venner tilbake som vert i et dyptgående intervju med stjernerne fra iCarly og viser deres supergøyale tabber og bortklipte scener. Gjestestjerne: Rex fra Victorious

programme.title: iCarly: Fortsatt like gal
programme.desc: Ettr å ha fått beskjed om at Nora Dershlit blir løslatt fra fengselet, ser iCarly-gjengen på hva de kan gjøre for å holde sin gamle kidnapper bak lås og slå. Imens oppdager Freddies mor den virkelige T-Bo.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly møter One Direction
programme.desc: Carly får en smittsom sykdom og kommer til å smitte et medlem i bandet One Direction. I mens skal Spencer trene en liten jente som ikke kan fordra å morsjonere.

programme.title: iCarly: Restauranten
programme.desc: Gibby åpner en hemmelig restaurant i skolens kjeller med Sams hjelp. Og Spencer designer en sikkerhetsrobot til hjemmebruk, som plutselig mister fokus helt.

programme.title: iCarly: Aprilsnarr
programme.desc: I dette spesielle aprilsnarr-avsnittet blir Carly og Spencer satt på gaten, så gjengen sitter og tenker tilbake på sin tid i Bushwell Plaza. Men minnene deres stemmer kanskje ikke alltid helt med hvordan vi husker hendelsene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dårlig stemning i butikken
programme.desc: Freddies nye drømmejobb i Pear Store blir et mareritt når Sam også blir ansatt. Imens prøver Carly å bli inviteret ut av en fra Pear Store, og Spencer må melde seg til frivillig jobb på den lokale brannstasjonen.

programme.title: iCarly: Halloween
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen holder en "Halfoween"-fest, for de syns at det skal være Halloween to ganger i året. Men da en forkledd gjest spiller Carly og vennene et puss, blir festen litt for vill.

programme.title: iCarly: Chucks lillebror
programme.desc: Et sinna barn ønsker inderlig å hevne seg, men målskiven Spencer prøver iherdig å stoppe ham. Gibby blir knust når hans nye lekelaserpistol går i stykker, men blir fra seg av henrykkelse når Freddies reparsjion gir den overraskende krefter.

programme.title: iCarly: Utestengt
programme.desc: Når Carly bannlyser T-Bo fra hennes og Spencers hjem, hevner han seg ved å ikke slippe Carly inn på Groovy Smoothie. Imens oppdager Freddie og Gibby at det fins mange fordeler ved å spille i band...og også et par ulemper.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Las Vegas
programme.desc: Når Sam får vite at moren hennes er i fengsel i Vegas, bestemmer gjengen seg for å ta sine mest verdifulle eiendeler, kjøre til Vegas og pantsette dem - så de får nok penger til å betale borgen for henne. Gjesteartister: History Channels PAWN STARS.

programme.title: iCarly: Nattsynbrillene
programme.desc: Sams venn kommer ut av ungdomsfengselet, og Sam advarer alle om å holde seg unna, men Carly hører ikke etter og havner på dypt vann. Hjemme i leiligheten finner Spencer noen nattsynbriller.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 1
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York. De elsker New York og er kjempeglade for å være med i programmet, men alt kan skje på live tv.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 2
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York, men en stor klesmiss fra Gibby betyr store problemer for nettshowets fremtid.

programme.title: iCarly: Spencers venner
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen vil finne venner til Spencer på hans egen alder. De finner noen gode muligheter, men vil vennskapet blomstre?

programme.title: Totally Turtles
programme.desc: Cowabunga! Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles kommer rett fra kloakken og er klare til å kjempe mot både fremmede og mutante fiender. Ta en pizza og gjør deg klar for maksimal Turtle Power!
