programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Back to the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Etter åtte lange måneder med å sitte inne i et føderalt fengsel, er Mike 'The Situation' endelig fri. Gjengen er nok en gang hel.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Psychic Larges
programme.desc: Endelig frenes Mike med samboerne. Guido-ene finner ut hva familien har i vente med hjelp av et medium.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Single J-Woww
programme.desc: J-Woww bli offisielt skilt og det er på tide å feire det på storslått måte. Mike renvasker seg fra all møkka om hans tid på college.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Chicken Cutlets and Ketchup
programme.desc: Vinnys mor Paola, forbereder en storslått italiensk fest for Mike, og onkel Nino blir med. Samtidig inviterer Angelina en uventet gjest til baren.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Shorefather
programme.desc: Det er premierekveld for Guidos-ene da de ser en film de har laget for å hedre Mike. De klaemmer åtte måneder inn i en kveld og gjenskaper hva Mike gikk glipp av da han satt inne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Prenups and Misdemeanors
programme.desc: Gjengen trenger GTL. Angelina trenger en særeie-advokat. Jenni og Nicole trenger en spade - for å grave opp beviset med.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Unresolved Issues
programme.desc: Det er tid for utdrikningsfest og jentene drar til New Orleans for å feire Angelina. Men uløste problemer truer med å ødelegge hele greia.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Crash the Bachelorette
programme.desc: Jenni og Angelina renser luften. Og operasjon 'knus utdrikningslaget' får full effekt når Mike, Vinny og Pauly klekker en plan for å overta jentenes helg i New Orleans.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Beignets, Blow Up Dolls and Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Jenny står i spissen for Vinny. Er det en fugl, et fly eller The Designation?
programme.sub-title: Beignets, Blow Up Dolls and Bridesmaids

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: P-WOWW
programme.desc: Angelinas utdrikningsfest er overtatt av gutta og begynner med strippeklubben og slutter med at Pauly og Jenny ligger i samme seng.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: So That Happened!
programme.desc: Nedtellingen til Angelinas bryllup begynner. Mike avanserer og Pauly D og Jenni ville natt får samboerne til å stille mange spørsmål.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Rewriting History
programme.desc: Angelinas bryllup er like rundt hjørnet så gjengen feirer henne med en tur til Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: You Had Me At Um, Hello!
programme.desc: Den store dagen er endelig her! Jenni føler seg forhekset, Angelina velsignet og Mike litt oransje.
programme.sub-title: You Had Me At Um, Hello!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Speech Part 1
programme.desc: Angelina og Chris gifter seg. Vinny protesterer og jentenes tale til bruden leder til buing i Staten Island-stil.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Speech Part 2
programme.desc: Angelinas bryllupsfest blir kaotisk når Deena, Jenni og Nicole holder tale. Jentene blir forskrekket, Angelina raser og guttene prøver å gjøre det godt igjen. Men skaden er kanskje allerede gjort.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Mediation
programme.desc: To dager etter Angelinas bryllup, er jentene helt på tuppa over talen som ble hørt verden rundt. Og Mike "The Situation" blir megler i håp om å føre familien sammen igjen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Taken Pauly
programme.desc: Midt oppi en global pandemi, fortsetter jentene med sosial distansering, men ikke på grunn av covid-19. Pauly er full av overraskelser når samboerne får vite at han ikke sitter i karantene alene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Double Book
programme.desc: Desperate tider krever desperate tiltak og gutta er klare for en familieferie. R, S, V og P har en sniken overraskelse for å få jentene sammen igjen, men Deena har en egen overraskelse som kan komplisere alt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Single Ronnie
programme.desc: Nedtellingen til Angelina kommer er i gang, og gutta må finne ut hvordan de skal presentere nyheten for Deena. Samtidig prøver gjengen å spille Kirsten giftekniv ved å lage et datingprogram til singel-Ronnie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Trouble Shot At Love
programme.desc: Datingprogram-ekspertene DJ Pauly D og Vinny Guadagnino er programledere. Seks jenter konkurrerer om den ultimate ungkarens kjærlighet, Ronnie Magro, i det splitter nye datingprogrammet "A trouble shot at love."

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jurrasic Angelina
programme.desc: Dobbeltbokingen blir full av følelser da Angelina slår ned i Las Vegas-sjøen. Deena blir på tuppa når hun kommer og Vinny dukker for slagene og The Situation blir overveldet.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy's best friend moves away, while Annie's best friend from high school returns and makes a pass at Matt.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Annie blows a fuse when her recently widowed father comes to town with his new girlfriend. Wait till she finds out that Mary’s new boyfriend has a son.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary undergoes surgery after getting hit by a car and Annie prays for strength to forgive her father.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Don't Take My Love Away
programme.desc: At the church, Mary and Lucy get into a brawl right before the ceremony. It seems to clear the air and the slightly disheveled girls reappear with big smiles as the wedding march begins.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: See You in September
programme.desc: Annie and Eric can’t wait for the kids to go back to school, but they’re no sooner out the door than they’re home again...and in trouble.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: I Love You
programme.desc: When Matt catches the younger kids snooping, he sets a trap. But he catches Dad instead.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Who Knew?
programme.desc: Dad freaks out when he finds a joint in the house, and his trust for Matt may be lost.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Says Who?
programme.desc: Simon’s experiment with mind control backfires when Matt turns the tables and convinces him that he’s shrinking.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do
programme.desc: The Camden house feels like Heartbreak Hotel when Wilson and Mary split up and Matt gets a “Dear John” letter from Heather.
programme.sub-title: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Girls Just Want to Have Fun
programme.desc: Lucy innocently courts trouble by prancing around the mall in a short skirt and high heels while Eric helps a not-so-innocent girl in a gang.
programme.sub-title: Girls Just Want to Have Fun

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Do Something
programme.desc: Mom’s muffins are so delicious she decides to go into business…and quickly burns out.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: I Hate You
programme.desc: The girls learn that words can really hurt people, and Simon befriends a Holocaust survivor.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: Mary loses her cool when she finds out her brother paid his friend to go out with her.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Lead, Follow or Get Out of the Way
programme.desc: Mary wants to quit the basketball team when a new girl outperforms her.
programme.sub-title: Lead, Follow or Get Out of the Way

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Rush to Judgment
programme.desc: Mary’s hurt and confused when her coach’s interest in her moves beyond the basketball court.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Stuck in the Middle with You
programme.desc: Two boys are fighting for Lucy’s affections, while Annie and Eric are fighting in a marriage-counseling group.
programme.sub-title: Stuck in the Middle with You

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Red Tape
programme.desc: A mysterious personal ad in the school paper gets Matt more calls than he can handle.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Homecoming
programme.desc: The only thing keeping Mary from getting back on the court after her knee surgery is fear.

programme.title: Executioners
programme.desc: Oppfølgeren til «Heroic Trio» er her! Byen har blitt ødelagt av et atomangrep og en ond deformert skurk kontrollerer byens vannforsyning og har innflytelse over både en populær leder og en militaristisk oberst. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Hapkido
programme.desc: Tre Hapkido-studenter vender tilbake til Kina fra det japanskokkuperte Korea for å starte sin egen skole. En lokal japansk kampsportskole er ikke begeistret over dette og vil stoppe dem uansett hva. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Dragons Forever NO
programme.desc: Advokaten Jackie blir leid inn av en kjemikalie-fabrikk for å grave opp skitt om et fiskeri, som på sin side vil gå rettens vei fordi fabrikken forgifter fiskevannet deres. Jackie tar med seg sin våpenhandlervenn Wong for å skremme lederen for fiskeriet.

programme.title: The Protector NO
programme.desc: Billy er politimann i New York som nylig har fått en ny partner etter at hans tidligere kollega ble skutt i tjeneste. Det nye radarparet - Billy og Danny - får oppdraget med å ivareta sikkerheten på et moteshow.

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Lucky Stars NO
programme.desc: En informant på ferie i Thailand blir kontaktet og drept av mafiaens lakeier, men i sitt siste åndedrag forteller han til fullmektige Woo at han sendte et brev med informasjonen til en venn hjemme i Hong Kong.

programme.title: Eastern Condors
programme.desc: En gruppe asiatiske fanger blir rekruttert, trent, bevæpnet og sendt til Vietnam for å ødelegge et amerikansk våpenlager etter Vietnamkrigen, før Vietcong oppdager hvor det befinner seg. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Warriors Two
programme.desc: En bankansatt oppdager en plan om å drepe ordføreren. I sitt forsøk på å advare ordføreren blir han nesten drept, men en Shaolin-disipel redder ham og tar ham med til sin kung fu-mester. NB Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Half a Loaf of Kung Fu NO
programme.desc: Jackie Chan spiller den unge klønete Jiang. Jiang vokste opp uten foreldre og til tross for at han verken har et akademisk hode eller de kampsportferdighetene han gjerne skulle hatt, klarer han å lure seg til steder og berømmelse han bare kunne drømme om.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III NO
programme.desc: Det hele begynner med en at en magisk spire transporterer deres gode venn April gjennom tid og rom, helt til samuraienes Japan. Leonardo og gjengen drar med en gang etter henne, og må nå beseire den onde Lord Naringa for å redde April.

programme.title: When Taekwondo Strikes
programme.desc: Under den japanske okkupasjonen av Korea på 1930-tallet forsøker lederen for en liten motstandsbevegelse å få informasjon til sympatisører i Kina. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is being sued for malpractice by a patient. Louis knits Margaret a swest (sweater/vest) and Reggie, Bob and Jake discuss the worst ways to die. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Beckers patient sues him for malpractice and Bob sleeps with his Johns lawyer, Ruth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker sees a psychologist and Linda looks for a new job.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: During an attempt to quit smoking, John attends a for-kids only pancake breakfast.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Jake gets married to a girl he just met. John buys a faux designer clock as a gift, which gets broken.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John helps a homeless man he discovered is a con artist when he learns the man is ill.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John panics when he has to get an MRI, finally resorting to Valium to get through the claustrophobic test.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John takes Reggies advice to be more sensitive with women. It helps at the office with Margaret, but backfires with a woman he is dating.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprised when a patient is disappointed at the news that he's not terminally ill. Jake scams Bob in a Scrabble game.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie goes out to dinner with her abusive friend Sara and Sara's husband, Richard. She finds that she and Richard are attracted to each other.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John believes that Christmas is a phony time of the year. Instead of embracing the Christmas spirit, he uses getting robbed as vindication for his position.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie and Chris compete for John's affection. Linda takes Margaret out for a night on the town.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: As John and Jake chat about Chris at the diner, Bob rushes in and announces that he just saw Chris naked when he went to fix her faucet.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a videotape of a French film that he plans to use to lure Chris into coming over to his place.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker tries to discourage a friend from expressing interest in Chris by telling him that she is gay.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris is in the kitchen when a robber enters.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, John expresses his repulsion for all the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.
programme.sub-title: I’ve Got Friends I Haven’t Used Yet

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Tanks have transformed warfare since their debut a century ago. Host Wil Willis traces their evolution from World War One breakthroughs to modern marvels like the M1 Abrams, the world's most powerful Main Battle Tank.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Could the mighty M2 be the greatest machine gun in history? Nicknamed “Ma Deuce”, this American machine gun has dominated battlefields for over 80 years. Host Wil Willis tests it and recreates Audie Murphy’s famous Medal of Honor moment.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: Japan continues its suicidal resistance, and invading it looks costly. After 2 atomic bombs, the Emperor intervenes and stops the War. Stalin grabs territory in East Asia. The War is over, and the Atomic Era and the Cold War start.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: France and Spain: The Pyrenees
programme.desc: Monty treks one of the toughest and most famous freedom trails out of Nazi controlled France, taking him through the valleys and high ridges of the Pyrenees mountains and into Spain.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Vidkun Quisling
programme.desc: Vidkun Quisling, once honored for diplomacy, turned traitor by collaborating with Nazis. His bid for power in Norway failed, relegated by Germans. Despite being named "fuehrer," his reign led to repression until his hanging post-Nazi defeat.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Devil's Due
programme.desc: During WWII, Greek Prime Ministers Tsolakoglou, Logothetopoulos, and Rallis collaborated with Nazi occupiers, imposing fees that caused a famine.

programme.title: Hitler's Mega Plane
programme.desc: In January 2012, Italian divers discovered the wreck of a massive plane off the coast of Sardinia. At a depth of 65 meters (213 feet) lies a Messerschmidt “Gigant”, the biggest aircraft in WWII.

programme.title: Secret War: The Dutch Disaster
programme.desc: Operation North Pole was a WWII German deception using captured SOE agents to mislead Britain. 47 of 50 agents were captured. Despite warnings, SOE ignored signs of compromise to maintain support, leading to a major intelligence failure.

programme.title: Secret War: The Mafia Connection
programme.desc: Lucky Luciano, a mafia boss of the 1930s, was in jail in 1942 on charges of running prostitution rings. US intelligence services did a deal with him and he got the Italians to share intelligence on German U boat movements.

programme.title: Hitler and I: Reflections on Evil
programme.desc: An in-depth, behind-the-scenes exploration of the making of the miniseries "Hitler: The Rise of Evil."

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Arajs Kommando
programme.desc: Viktor Arajs, a Latvian, played a significant role in the Holocaust, collaborating with the Nazis to eliminate Jews. Leading the Arajs Kommando, he orchestrated the killings of around 30,000 Jews. Arajs justified his actions as patriotic defense.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The IRA Conspiracy
programme.desc: During WWII, the IRA's "S Plan" aimed to bomb Britain, drawing German support to weaken the British. "Operation Green" and "Plan Kathleen" envisioned IRA aiding a German invasion of Northern Ireland, but both failed due to bungling and infighting.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Good Collaborators?
programme.desc: Finland defended itself in the Winter War under Marshal Mannerheim. Finland allied with Nazi Germany against the Soviet Union in 1941. Finland later negotiated peace with the Allies and switched sides as Nazi defeat became apparent.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Croatian Collaborator
programme.desc: Croatia grapples with its fascist past through figures like Dinko Sakic, once hailed as a hero but later convicted of war crimes. Leading the notorious Jasenovac camp, Sakic oversaw brutal atrocities against inmates.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Preparing for War
programme.desc: Hitler unveils his military plans: annex Austria, seize the Sudetenland, and eventually invade Poland and the Soviet Union. By March 1938, Austria falls bloodlessly. By September 1939, he invades Poland, sparking World War Two.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Artillery, "The King of Battle," has shaped history from ancient cannons to today's M777 Howitzer. Host Wil Willis visits Fort Sill, Oklahoma, to witness modern artillery like the M777 and M109 Paladin in action.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Weapons That Changed The World examines the RPG-7, renowned for its ability to take on tanks and level buildings. Host Wil Willis traces its evolution from WWII's Bazooka to modern counterparts like the AT-4 and Carl Gustav.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jasmine & Mike
programme.desc: Jasmine og Mike har sendt hverandre meldinger i to år, og hun tror at han kan være den perfekte stefar for sønnen hennes. Selv om de bare bor 15 minutter fra hverandre, har de ennå ikke møtt hverandre personlig.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Joe & Kari Ann
programme.desc: Joe var skeptisk da den tidligere Miss Teen USA, Kari Ann Peniche, ba ham om å bli venner på Facebook. Nå, etter måneder med intens kommunikasjon, tror Joe at det muligens er den ekte Kari Ann, og at han muligens er forelsket i henne også.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Michael & Chanelle
programme.desc: Michael hadde ikke tid til et forhold, men kjærligheten åpenbarte seg i en melding. Chanelle er det lysglimtet han trengte i sitt liv, men helt plutselig har hun bare forsvunnet - nå må Nev og Max finne hans tapte kjærlighet.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kayla & Courtney
programme.desc: Da Kayla var 2 år, drepte faren hennes moren hennes og begikk så selvmord. Mange år senere får Kayla en beskjed fra Courtney, en kvinne som påstår at hun kanaliserer hennes døde fars ånd.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Candic & Titus
programme.desc: Etter flere måneder med intime tekstmeldinger med Titus, en mann hun møtte på nettet, vil Candic innrømme alt overfor mannen sin. Men først må Nev og Max hjelpe henne med å finne ut hvem Titus egentlig er.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kiaira & Cortney
programme.desc: Kiaira og Cortney fikk barn sammen. Men Kiaira har aldri møtt Cortney eller babyen! Nev og Max blir kalt inn for å bringe familien sammen, men de er bekymret for at dette kan være tidenes største Catfish-manipulasjon.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Angel & Jordan
programme.desc: Angel matchet med Jordan på Tinder, noe som forårsaket at hun avsluttet et ekte forhold til fordel for ham. Når Nev og kona Laura undersøker saken, avdekker de mørke sannheter som kan gjøre at Angel mister alle sine nærmeste.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Chelsea & Charles
programme.desc: Nev og Max vil hjelpe Chelsea med å endeleig få møte sin nettkjæreste Charles ansikt til ansikt. Chelsea har snakket med Charles kun en gang på telefon, men gutta vil snart vise henne et bilde som sier alt.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike & Joey
programme.desc: Nev og medprogramleder Jane Carrey hjelper den ambisiøse Mike til å velge mellom sitt rolige liv i Los Angeles og hans dype hengivenhet til den mystiske Joey, en blakk mekaniker som han ble forelsket i på Grindr.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Aubri & Brian
programme.desc: Nev og medprogramleder Slick Woods hjelper 19 år gamle Aubri med å finne sin Snapchat-flørt Brian. Brian sier at han bor på Aubris universitet, men har dårlige unnskyldninger for å ikke møtes. Nev og Slick besøker campus i jakt på svar.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Deven & James
programme.desc: Nev og NFL-stjernen Rashad Jennings hjelper Deven med å finne nettflørten James. James vil ikke videochatte, men ber Deven om å fly over hele landet for å møtes! Deven håper på kjærlighet, men er forberedt på en felle, og trenger svar.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kristina & Faith
programme.desc: Da Kristina møtte Faith i et chatterom hadde hun ikke planlagt å forelske seg, og svike sin forlovede i virkeligheten. Nå må Nev og Tallulah Willis navigere en kjærlighetstriangel på jakten etter sannheten.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Angel & Remy
programme.desc: Nev og partneren Elle King hjelper Angel å finne sin nett-kjærlighet Remy. Det nærmeste Angel har kommer Remy var da han skummelt nok så på henne utenfor bilen hennes. Angel trenger svar, men er hun klar for sannheten?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Cherie & Avion
programme.desc: Sexy Avion overtaler Cherie til å sende ham vågede bilder, men Cherie er redd hun har vist feil mann tillit. Nev og Justin Combs prøver å hjelpe, men tingene går fort nedenom og hjem da de får en sint samtale fra kona til Avion.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Zay & Jayda
programme.desc: Nev og Kamie dykker ned i noe vrient. Zay har blitt involvert i den vakre Jayda, noe som belaster hennes allerede besværlige ekteskap. Men løgnene er så omfattende at det er vanskelig å finne sannheten.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Michael & Dustin
programme.desc: Michael har snakket med Dustin i tre år, men da han fant hans hemmmelige konto i soslale medier, oppdaget Michael at nettkjærligheten er en gift mann. Kan Nev og Kamie hjelpe ham med å finne sannheten bak hans hjerts utkårne?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Keontae & Tyler
programme.desc: Keontae ble hektet da han traff modellkollegaen Tyler på Instagram. Men Tyler vil ikke treffes fordi han er på DM. Da Nev og Kamie graver dypere, finner de ut at Tylers seksuelle identitet kanskje ikke er den eneste hemmeligheten hans.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sham & Phillip
programme.desc: Sham ble blåst av banen av en arabisk Instagram-prins ved navn Philip, men han har i det siste agerte kongelig suspekt! Er prinsen hennes ekte? Eller kommer Nev og Kamie til å besanne Shams drøm om å bli en arabisk prinsesse?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jaquan & Shantel
programme.desc: Catfish er på sporet og skal hjelpe Jaquan med å kontakte hans mystiske nettelsker, Shantel. Men etter et antall sjokkerende oppdagelser, blir Nev og Kamie minnet om at i 'Catfish' vet du aldri hvem du kan stole på!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jasmine & Mike
programme.desc: Jasmine og Mike har sendt hverandre meldinger i to år, og hun tror at han kan være den perfekte stefar for sønnen hennes. Selv om de bare bor 15 minutter fra hverandre, har de ennå ikke møtt hverandre personlig.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The three remaining girls arrive in Buenos Aires for the Fashion Week. They have to work backstage.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The pressure mounts as the remaining two competitors face the glare of the press and the glamour of the modeling high-life before their final showdown.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In the 90 minute season premiere 25 girls arrive at bootcamp and meet their host Elle Macpherson. They also come face to face with the other judges, fashion designer Julian MacDonald, stylist Grace Woodward and ex-male model Charley Speed.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In the first week of the main competition, the final 14 move into their new model house and participate in a lingerie themed photo shoot. The girls then have their first official elimination of the main competition. One girl is sent home.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls receive their makeovers, but not all are happy with their new looks. The models are assigned a photoshoot wearing Links of London couture.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls meet Girls Aloud singer Nicola Roberts and take part in a photoshoot for Beat Bullying.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls take part in a posing challenge on Carnaby Street then film a commercial for Beyonce's new fragrance 'Heat'. The photoshoot involves being covered in chocolate which proves difficult for one girl who shows up hungover.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Alesha Dixon meets the models and tasks them with selling her new jewelry line on live television. After meeting Grace in Gatwick airport they are given £500 to go on a shopping spree. They are then whisked off to Spain to do a photoshoot in swim wear.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls take part in an acting challenge on the Hollyoaks set and one girl gets carried away on a night out with some of the cast members. The girls must do a horror style photoshoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models face an icy photoshoot when they fly off to Norway.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: This week the girls do a beauty shoot for Revlon and some girls are pushed over the edge in a second shoot for 'Galaxy Ripple'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A challenge with Nicky Johnston sees one model facing harsh criticism. The girls then do a photoshoot with TV personality George Lamb and take part in a photoshoot with a London Rugby team for legendary photographer Terry O'Neill.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 5 arrive in Kuala Lumpar and meet with fashion legend Jimmy Choo to take part in a dance challenge. The photoshoot this week takes place at night for Baby G watches.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 4 are sent on go-sees around Kuala Lumpar and are sent to the jungle for their photoshoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 3 recreate some of Elle's most famous poses and there is a shock at elimination.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The winner of Britain's Next Top Model is decided in the first ever live final of the series.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson and the judges begin their search by holding auditions in Glasgow and London

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson and the judges Grace Woodward, Julien Macdonald and Charley Speed continue their UK tour, in Cardiff and Birmingham. They audition more girls hoping to make it in the world of modelling.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: A dad finds out that parenting is harder than he thought after his wife goes back to work and he's left at home to take care of the kids.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: A dad finds out that parenting is harder than he thought after his wife goes back to work and he's left at home to take care of the kids.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: A dad finds out that parenting is harder than he thought after his wife goes back to work and he's left at home to take care of the kids.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Andi hires a pretty, young babysitter, Sophia (Victoria Justice), to watch the kids, and gets jealous when her daughter, Kate, goes to her instead for advice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam discovers that the pastor he hired for their wedding was a phony and he and Andi aren't really married, he scrambles to find a way to fix it before she finds out.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam needs to hire a new project manager, Andi accuses Adam of unconscious bias after he only interviews men for the job.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam notices his Dad's increasingly forgetful behavior, he struggles with how to approach him to discuss it.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When the kids won't do their chores, Adam and Andi decide to go on strike too.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam thinks Kate's boyfriend, Tyler (Griffin Gluck), is a pothead, he decides to confront Tyler but doesn't get the support he expects from Andi.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam takes his kids to work with him for the day, they accidentally give his biggest client lice. Also, Andi feels like a bad mom when she's the only one in the family not to get lice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi agree on a present-free Valentine's Day, Adam gives the gift he planned for Andi to his mother instead.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi try to get back in their neighbors' good graces after no one shows up to their potluck.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi are caught off guard by unexpected expenses, they each decide to give up a luxury to pay them off.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi gets Bev (Swoosie Kurtz) a spot volunteering at the hospital, Joe becomes bored and starts spending too much time with Adam.
programme.sub-title: Guess Who's Coming to Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi and Adam disagree about Kate attending a dance with an older boy, Adam tries to outsmart Andi to win the argument.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to organize a birthday dinner for Andi and he discovers that managing guests isn't easy.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi lose footage of an intimate moment they accidentally recorded, they have to track it down before anyone can see it.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi's folks decide to visit them for Easter, Adam and Andi have to keep the peace between both sets of parents.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam insists that pranks are harmless fun, Andi creates an elaborate hoax to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam is determined to figure out what Andi's hiding when he discovers she's been keeping secrets from him for his own good.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled and honored to help Joe buy a new car but is caught off guard when Joe suddenly becomes irritable, and the negotiations go off track.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don realize they need to bring in more business, they film a commercial advertising their company.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi set up Adam's boss on a date to boost her spirits in the hope that she'll then be in the mood to have Adam resume work on the mini-mall.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Andi proposes an exciting idea for Adam and her to go into business together when she isn't able to find work. Also, Adam tackles the most challenging job of his life - renovating Joe and Bev's (Swoosie Kurtz) kitchen.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to make the office feel more inviting since Andi will be joining him at work every day; Lowell hides a life-changing secret.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi have a disagreement at the office and must prevent it from becoming a problem at home; the kids try to extend Lowell's stay at their house after realizing he's an amazing cook.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam sees a kid push Emme, he convinces Teddy to defend his younger sister; Adam and Don persuade Joe to hire a nurse to help him after he has his upcoming knee surgery.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and the guys visit Lowell at his new bachelor pad and start using it to get away from their home lives; Andi keeps pushing Adam for her own desk at the office.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam catches Kate sneaking back into the house at night, he is determined to fix the behavior with old-school parenting tactics; Andi is dismayed when she can't find many baby pictures of Emme.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi go to great lengths to secure a loan to fix an unexpected issue on their flip house.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi are eager to book a night away in a hotel after Teddy keeps sleeping in their bed; Kate is allowed to stay home alone but doesn't follow Adam and Andi's strict rules.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam offers to go on a vegan diet with Kate in an effort to bond with her, his love of meat proves a hard habit to break.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: After Adam throws out his back on his 50th birthday, he is still determined to take a dirt bike excursion and check it off his bucket list; Don and Adam give out bonuses at work.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam gets jealous when Teddy names Andi as his hero for a school essay.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam accidentally invites Andi to go on the guys' annual trip, he tries to un-invite her, which only makes matters worse.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam recruits Marcy to put Andi's snooty sister in her place when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi see how much Lowell's new relationship with Andi's sister is changing him, they stage an intervention to get him to stop putting up with her bad behavior.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi's doctor advises her to stop taking birth control pills, Adam and Andi disagree on an alternate option.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Andre Pachon is the leader of the French chef community in Japan. Several of his apprentices have already appeared, but this time Pachon sends his number one man.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The younger sibling of the Liang brothers, rulers of Cantonese cuisine in Japan, faces the Iron Chef Chinese.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen engages Challenger Lian Su Qin using konnyaku, a unique Japanese healthy food.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a woman who knows what she likes. As an elite culinary critic, she trained at Le Cordon Bleu and as well as Taillevent, an elite French restaurant in Paris.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The former Iron Chef Michiba decides that Morimoto needs some help finding his feet, so he recruits his number one sous-chef from his own days at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Japan's culinary media is dominated by today's challenger, a food critic, musician and graphic artist. Kentaro is determined to make a name for himself at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The Iron Chef Italian is challenged by a chef hailing from Kyoto who never ceases to pack his restaurant with customers.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Morimoto fights a traditionalist chef who fills his dishes with nostalgia.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Meiji Kinenkan is the oldest bridal hall in Japan undergoing an upgrade to celebrate its 50th anniversary. This includes the addition of a Chinese restaurant and its new grand chef.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen stirs up his best yogurt presentation against Challenger Junichi Ito.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto battles with Challenger Tsuyoshi Kajimoto as they innovate with abalone, a shellfish.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The Iron Chef is called upon to face Miyoko Sakai, a famed Thai food critic who has had the privilege to learn the secrets of royal Thai cuisine straight from the source.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Morimoto faces another traditionalist who is infamous for his temper, his steadfast discipline and his adherence to tradition.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger in this battle of peach is Masanobu Watabe, owner of Le Rameau d'Or in Yokohama, Japan. Watabe runs the entire 22-seat restaurant by himself.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chen's challenger is a man who masters Chaozhou-style Chinese cuisine, an exacting style that is actually able to please the sensitive tastes of customers in Kyoto.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Sakai battles the 'conjurer of garlic,' a chef who embraces the pungent ingredient as real Italians do. Sakai is further challenged to use live squids in the dishes.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Three years after losing to Iron Chef Chen, the Italian restaurant Sabatini demands a rematch, this time sending in the master chef of their Tokyo restaurant.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Led by Tadamichi Ohta, the chef who defeated Sakai, the Ohta faction invades Kitchen Stadium to uphold traditional Japanese cuisine. Fuji is team Ohta's first contender against Morimoto.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: In honor of the Girls' Festival, Kaga invites a challenger from the ancient city of Kamakura, Motohito Kondo, who was trained in Kyoto and is an expert in both tea and sake.

programme.desc: Hvis du elsker kjærlighet i alle dens former, er denne kanalen for deg! Kos deg med alle MTV-programmene der kjærlighet aldri er for mye!

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark investigate a gang of drug smugglers after an old friend of Mark's has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan attempts to fan the flames of love between a woman and her ex-husband's best friend. But his efforts backfire when he falls for the woman himself.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark is in a state between life and death when he's critically injured in a car accident. Jonathan takes Mark back to childhood to give him a second chance to tell his grandfather how much he loves him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan steps in when a heart condition sidelines a promising basketball player's dreams.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are on hand when a dying woman attempts a reconciliation with her estranged father. She is a single mother who wants her family to take the child.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Scotty is a lovelorn quadriplegic with a successful law practice. Jonathan is happy to play cupid, but Mark isn't so thrilled about it, because the woman in question is his cousin.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A greedy banker and a good-hearted bum switch places. The bum dies, but the banker is now infused with love and generosity.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark meet a child star whose fame is spoiling her rotten, destroying her family and taking away her childhood.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan encourages residents in a neighborhood to unite against a cold-hearted developer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan inspires a young man to help the grandfather who has recently been placed in a nursing home.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Lizzy MacGill is a horse trainer's young daughter who elopes with Garth Armstrong, a privileged man.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help Lizzie. The new bride has cancer and she is pregnant.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark and Jonathan become counselors at a camp for children with cancer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are helping patients at Camp Good Times in different ways. But a father still refuses to deal with his son's illness.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan relinquishes his angelic powers for awhile and realizes the dangers that Mark has faced being a police officer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An aspiring actress wants to be accepted for who she really is, not in the image her well-meaning dad tries to transform her into.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark has been tricked into selling his soul in order to save a little girl's life. But the Devil has another agenda: acquiring Jonathan's soul.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Factory workers ignore ground-water contamination, even though it is making their children sick. As a result, Jonathan takes drastic measures to force them to face the facts.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Five gunmen individually hired to kill Marshal Matt Dillon converge on Dodge City.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Strother Martin guest stars as Ben Snow, a half-crazed desert hermit who saves Festus' life only to force him to become a human pack animal.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A widow's ranch is requisitioned by the Union Army, making her the target of Confederate cavalrymen.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: In Apache country, a missionary engages in a philosophic battle with an escaped murderer.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Vultures
programme.desc: Two bounty hunters arrive in the Dodge City area looking for a wanted man. They shoot him for a $1000 reward. Earp agrees to get their money but wants them out of town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Plagued by gold thefts, Denver bankers set up their own mint in the bank basement.
programme.sub-title: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Unable to come to terms, a U.S. senator and a Supreme Court justice agree to a duel.
programme.sub-title: A Gun Is Not a Gentleman

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Wells Fargo stage driver Charlie Parkhurst wins fame for his daring endeavors.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: In part two, A young outlaw is reformed by the kindness and help of an elderly female junk collector.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Jeb Slade talks his brother Billy into helping him rob Aaron Winters, who is wealthy from his borax findings.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Buff McCloud runs a Nevada town with an iron fist — until a stranger arrives.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt's Decision
programme.desc: Earp decides to leave Tombstone but learns the Clantons are gunning for him. Nellie Cashman and Dick Gird want Earp to stay to bring law and order to Tombstone.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An embittered ranch woman holds Matt Dillon and Kitty prisoner while plotting Matt's execution to avenge her husband's hanging.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Just Before the Battle
programme.desc: A stagecoach holdup orchestrated by Johnny Ringo and Curly Bill gives Wyatt Earp the opportunity he's been waiting for--a chance to get the rival factions to turn on each other.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Hunt the Man Down
programme.desc: Earp is forced with the help of Mr. Cousin to go into the rough Bushwhacker area to track down a man wanted for murder.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: An attorney takes the case of a famed gunman who is charged with murder.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: One-Man Army
programme.desc: Texan Drum Denman goes after northerner Earp by backing a free newspaper to print false stories about Earp trying to draw him out of Dodge City.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Lt. Robert Benson becomes torn when the woman he loves asks him to give out secret government information.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: A Good Man
programme.desc: A reformed gambler Tittle comes to Dodge City preaching against gambling and the devil. Earp is forced to intervene when Tittle preaches in a popular saloon.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: On one drunken evening, a miner gives a pretty saloon singer half-interest in his apparently worthless claim.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Winfield Stratton finds gold just after selling his mining claim to a syndicate.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Time for All Good Men
programme.desc: The owner of the Big T Rance Purcell and his foreman Gus Andrews trap Earp alone at Stony Wells. Earp outnumbered 30 to 1 is running out of water and ammo.
programme.sub-title: The Time for All Good Men

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A crafty rancher tries to frame his wife with a hired hand in a plot to force money from her father.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Two bronco busters risk their lives to raise money for a ranch in Montana, only to have the dream ruined by a wild stallion.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A man seeking to open a saloon turns to Harry Bassett, Wyatt Earp and Bat Masterson for help.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Suspicious townspeople are drawn toward two brothers who spend their nights digging at a grave.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Bat Masterson Again
programme.desc: Earp learns Masterson has dropped out of school and is a scout for the Army.

programme.title: Harlequin: Recipe for Revenge
programme.desc: Caterer Carly Westin agrees to prepare a feast for a friend who wants to impress a man. But the couple is killed when she is in the kitchen. When police investigator Jack Brannigan gets involved, he must protect Carly before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Harlequin: A Change of Place
programme.desc: When troubled twin Dominique asks her bookish sister Kimberly to assume her role for a month as a glamorous Parisian model, Kimberly hesitates.

programme.title: Harlequin: Another Woman
programme.desc: Da Lisa våkner på sykehuset, husker hun ingenting:at mannen hennes Paul vil skille seg fra henne, eller at hun ble brutalt slått og etterlatt for å dø. Når Paul tar henne med hjem, må Lisa lære alt på nytt. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Treacherous Beauties
programme.desc: Anne mistenker at broren Alans død ikke var en ulykke. Hun begynner å jobbe for en familie som kan ha hatt en finger med i spillet, men blir snart forelsket i den eldste sønn. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Broken Lullaby
programme.desc: En foreldreløs jentes (Mel Harris) jakt etter fortiden begynner med et barndomsbilde av henne selv ved siden av en sjelden spilledåse, og fører henne til en lokkende skattejeger. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: At the Midnight Hour
programme.desc: En vakker barnepike(Liz) fanger oppmerksomheten Richard, en enkemann og vitenskapsmann, og hans begavede sønn Andy. Liz' liv blir truet når hun kommer for nær sannheten om hvem som drepte den tidligere hans frue. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Awakening
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter who's tracking one of her tenants convinces Sara McAllister to team up with him, they start an adventure into the dangerous world of international espionage and love.

programme.title: Harlequin: This Matter of Marriage
programme.desc: Arkitektene Hallie og Donnalee arbeider med et stort byggeprosjekt for en eksentrisk milliardær, Adam Barr. Hallieshar lett etter drømmemannen, finner ham plutselig rett ved siden av. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Hard to Forget
programme.desc: Privatdetektiv Max etterforsker Sandra Applewhites død og er overbevist om at hennes ektemann John Gilman drepte henne. Når han møter Sandras tvillingsøster Nicky, ber han henne om hjelp til å avsløre Gilman. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Diamond Girl
programme.desc: Playboy-advokaten Denny ser aldri på sin kjedelige og lojale assistent Claire Bernard. Men når han oppdager at Claire er en uslipt diamant, bestemmer han seg for å forvandle henne til en fortryllende skjønnhet. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood i gang kjøretøyene sine i 'Flyktende motorer', vender det andre kinnet til i 'Overraskelseskyss' og hogger i vei med litt 'Økseanarki'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood L
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og deres spesielle gjest Lolo Wood, redd for å få sprøyter i 'Stikkpanikk', får igjen verbalt i 'Ta igjen-attakk' og føler hele dekkmønsteret når de blir 'Overkjørt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at uhell elsker selskap i 'Du blir med meg', strever med vekter i 'Verstinger med vekstang' og møter noen fryktelig glade papper i 'Overentusiastiske fedre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' smasher Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood handlevogner med 'Vognkrasjere', deler luftyogaens felles smerte med 'Dinglende duoer' og blir banket opp av gårdsdyr i 'Buskapssmell'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood lett i 'Henfallen til fall', forbauser aper voldsomt med 'Apemagi' og har problemer med å finne tingene sine i 'Borte, men funnet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kan ikke Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood løpe fra den morsomme snublingen i 'Fluktfall', viser fram imponerende bisker i 'Hermehunder' og snakker varmt for bruken av solide hodeplagg i 'Skudd fra oven'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvor stor skade en strippepåle kan forårsake i «Pål-lateral skade', oppdager at ikke alle liker å bli skremt i 'Skremtraseri' før de avslutter med noen 'Forlatte farer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut fra tee i 'Sving-ding', krasjer med 'Små landingsmatter' og blir offer for noen 'Byfeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av sangeren Teddy Swims og ser nærmere på folk som 'Mister kontrollen', får faderlige råd i 'Pappavisdom og kaster ut noen problemtyper i 'Vis dem veien ut'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood problemer med å sette seg på grunn av 'Stolnasking', møter brått uventede dyr i 'Dyrestøkk' og bruker god tid på å falle i 'Gradvise fall'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood nærbilkontakt med leppene i 'Bilkyssere', får seg et slag under beltestedet med 'Lavtslåtte damer' og orker ikke å spise når de er sammen med 'Matlystslukkere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at telefoner kan være distraherende i 'Telefonblind', møter unger som bør finne seg en annen sportsgren i 'Minigolfere' og besøker noen steder der det er 'Kjempekaldt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood smertefullt på hodet i 'Stup hvor som helst', kaster seg på sykkelen i 'Pedaltrøkk rett i pølen' og blir vitner til tupékatastrofer i 'Tupé på vift'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hva som skjer når du ikke lander støtt i 'Ustø landing', sjekker de mest lojale kjærestene i 'Jeg er opptatt' og avslutter med uheldige campere i 'Glamourløs camping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med stil idet de 'Flyr over styret', spaserer på løs grunn i 'Fallgulv' og drar for å gjøre innkjøp altfor sent i 'Grubutikken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hogger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ned trær med noen 'Tømmerflopper', får seg noen 'Luftige-svev-madrasser' og har det kjempekult på 'Rockeførskolen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' havner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood i 'Faresoner', avklarer ulike situasjoner av 'Glassknas' og oppnår betydelig høyde med 'Flygebiler'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood ufokuserte fedre med 'Distraherte pappahjerner', driver høyt spill i golf med 'Djerv gjenvinning' og viser sine fiseferdigheter når de utfører 'Gasstriks'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppsummerer Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood kostnadene ved å ha barn i 'Dyre barn', snubler over sirkusartister som lager 'Plutselig sirkus' og opplever slitsomme feiringer med 'Dårlige bursdager'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' denger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hodet i veggen som første trekk i 'Kraftskaller', ødelegger golfutstyret sitt i 'På tide med nye køller' og møter farene ved å benytte 'Samkjøring om natten'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' utforsker Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood ildidrettens verden i 'Flammesport', finner ut hvor farlige dører kan være i 'Helt av hengslene' og blir overrasket over noen svært 'Uventede raketter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood inn i ubevegelige gjenstander i 'Parkert smerte', oppdager at trafikkflyten kan påvirkes av bisarre årsaker i 'Motorveiforsinkelser' og opplever farene ved 'Olme okser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' støter Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på farlige voltere uten 'Saltobevissthet', opplever smerten ved knuste tohjulinger i Billigsykler' og oppdager at heis og fyll ikke går så godt sammen i 'Heisa-heistur'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å muntre opp folk som er 'Vinterdeppa', finner ut hva som skjer når du faller og opplever 'Fjes mot gjerde' og ødelegger perfekte øyeblikk med 'Triste forlovelsesopptak'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' lider Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av 'Konsertforvirring', får smaken på 'Søvnsnacks' og flykter fra noen 'Hissige sammenstøt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og medvert Lolo Wood det tøft når de flytter ut og blir 'Såre flyttefolk', møter noen nye medarbeidere som er 'Dumme på jobben' og finner ut at det er greit å gi opp i 'Vi kutter ut'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på trynet i gresset idet de 'Eter plen', blir veltrent og hårete med muskelforbundne 'Gymhunder' og går langt under null i 'Dypfryst moro'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en fare for seg selv i 'Selvfelling', drar på gymet for å få seg en 'Boksesekktrøkk' og går langt i å utfordre høydeskrekken med 'Elleville høyder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjør Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en smidig sorti over 'Sikkerhetsgjerder', trenger å rense bilinteriøret i 'Bil-kryp' og tester chuggekapasiteten i 'Styrterekyl'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne 'Ridiculousness' har Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med en spesiell gjest, Dee Snider, og møter rebeller i 'Tenker ikke å tåle det', opplever band som sliter i 'Kommer ikke til å slå gjennom' og blir nedstemt av spilt kaffe i 'Kaffetragedier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på konsekvensene ved å overse skilt i 'Skiltblind', lærer om merkelige ting som er 'Teknisk sett sant' og finner ut hvordan sprø ting blir 'Sprøere og sprøere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood syklister få seg en overraskelse i 'Uventede sykkelhinder', møter ondskapsfulle katter som viser 'Kattevrede' før de tar en titt på folk som setter hodet fast i 'Skallefeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg på 'Kostymekatastrofer', kommer i kontakt med 'Etikettefjerne folk' og blir vitner til 'Nære på-overganger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' med Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah får vi se strålende treffsikkerhet i 'Skallesnikskyting', finner ut av hva som er motsatt av å prestere under press i 'Vanære under press' og avslutter med noen 'Sjalu hjerter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' drar Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood for å skate med gjenstander på hjul som er 'Park-uforenlig', tar bilder og får seg en smell i 'Knipseattakk' og holder fast på verdisakene i møte med 'Mobile skurker'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood hvor ekstrem bordtennis kan være i 'Pinpongvondt', blir kilt, rosa, svart og blå i en 'Kiletrøkk' og får justert ryggraden med noen 'Bakoverbøyere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kommer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood farlig nær kanten i 'Uten kantfølelse', får bowlingvondt i 'Baneovertredelser' og trenger å slå av konsollen i 'Gamevrede'.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om et spøkelse som var vitne til flere drap. I mellomtiden har Ariel en merkelig reaksjon på en oppgave i helsetimen.
programme.sub-title: Things to Do in Phoenix When You're Dead

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Mens hun jobber med en 17 år gammel forbrytelse, viser Allison uvanlig oppførsel som kan være avgjørende for å løse saken, men som samtidig setter familien hennes i fare.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison våkner under en motorvei uten å vite hvor hun er eller hvordan hun kom dit. Hennes mangel på hukommelse får henne til å begynne å tenke at hun kan ha drept noen med bilen sin.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir bedt av Devalos om å hjelpe noen av vennene hans med å finne deres savnede datter, men møter motstridende bevis på hvem som er ansvarlig for hennes forsvinning.
programme.sub-title: A Taste of Her Own Medicine

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Flere urovekkende drømmer om en forestående apokalypse får Allison til å ta drastiske tiltak som forberedelse til sivilisasjonens undergang.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison får nok en gang besøk av spøkelset til agent Cooper, som prøver å hjelpe henne med å finne ut hvem den virkelige morderen er i en forvirrende sak.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har en drøm om et gameshow som kan avsløre løgner, og når hun våkner, hører hun en buzzer i hodet hver gang noen forteller henne en løgn.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har mistanke om at en savnet kvinne kan være et offer for hennes merkelige barn. I mellomtiden dukker Joes søster Sarah opp uanmeldt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison våkner fem år tilbake i tid etter at hun og Devalos blir skutt av en fremmed. Tidligere har Allisons drømmer fortalt henne at Devalos vil dømme en uskyldig mann for drap.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: En mann ved navn Lucas Harvey forfølger Allison, overbevist om at han gjør Guds arbeid ved å kvitte seg med henne og hennes evner.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison fortsetter å bli plaget av Lucas Harvey, hennes besatte stalker. Harvey forstyrrer Allisons drømmer, noe som gjør henne lite hjelpsom for Devalos og Scanlon under en sak om en seriemorder.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter å ha falt i koma under en etterforskning, finner Allisons ånd veien inn i kroppen til en mann ved navn Todd Emory.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison henvender seg til Cynthia Keener (som nå er i fengsel) når hun begynner å drømme om et tidligere kidnappingsoffer som Cynthia en gang reddet.
programme.sub-title: The First Bite Is the Deepest

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Mens Allison takler Joes jobbflytting til San Diego, drømmer hun om og møter deretter en bankansatt ved navn Mrs. Boddicker som forutså et ran i banken hennes.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når aspekter av Allisons drøm om å miste hele familien begynner å skje i virkeligheten, frykter hun at drømmen hennes kan gå i oppfyllelse.
programme.sub-title: Bring Me the Head of Oswaldo Castillo

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison og familien hennes må håndtere resultatene av hjerneoperasjonen hennes. Eieren av en lokal TV-stasjon ber også Devalos og Scanlon om å undersøke om sportsankeret hans blir forfulgt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir bekymret etter at Ariel begynner å vise merkelig oppførsel, og begynner å tenke at en myrdet stripper kan besitte henne.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Allisons kreftrammede venn dør uventet, mistenker hun at en sykehusansatt kan ha skylden. Bridgette skriver en historie veldig nær det som senere skjer på Joes jobbintervju.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir forvirret når hun begynner å se visjoner om merkelige symboler. Når en seriemorder slår Phoenix, oppdager hun at symbolene kan være ledetråder for å fange morderen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Et spedbarn blir kidnappet fra Allisons nabolag, og hun blir så fast bestemt på å finne barnet at Joe frykter at hun kan ha blitt besatt.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully and Dr. Mike take desperate action as the battle between the Buffalo Soldiers and The Dog Soldiers escalates.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Matthew becomes addicted to gambling.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dorothy's charming son, a war hero, comes home with a war injury and a shameful secret -- a drug addiction.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A Denver banker returns to town and brings the Ku Klux Klan with him.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The new school teacher may be guilty of child abuse.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela is kidnapped by the dog soldiers, and Sully vows to find her before she is killed.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela is kidnapped by the dog soldiers, and Sully vows to find her before she is killed.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Jake runs for mayor against a surprising candidate--Dr. Quinn.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Hank, distraught over Myra quitting, ends up comatose.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela's love for Sully is put to the test when a stranger from her past comes to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela's love for Sully is put to the test when a stranger from her past comes to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A new railroad through town means a bright future for Colorado Springs, but an uncertain one for Dr. Mike and Sully.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Loren and Brian plot different courses to prove they're courageous men, until danger unites them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Loren's sister, Miss Olive, has died and bequeathed her cattle to Matthew who, along with Dr. Mike, Sully, Colleen, Brian, Loren, Robert E, and Grace, attempts to bring the cattle back to a ranch near Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The Cattle Drive continues with various difficulties to overcome, including conflicts between Matthew and Sully, cattle rustlers, hungry Indians, and a prairie fire. Dr. Mike delivers a calf, and Sully helps her clean up afterwards.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Elizabeth sends crates of books from Michaela's deceased father's collection, prompting her to open a public library. Many become alarmed at the content of some of the books and want to prevent people from reading them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Brian rescues a man from a trap who has horrific burns to his face from a train crash. Michaela decides to perform reconstructive surgery to repair his face.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Cloud Dancing and the rest of the Cheyenne are told to move to a reservation where they would be dependent on handouts. Dr. Mike, Sully, and the children head to Washington to lodge a complaint and get the order changed.

programme.title: Dynasty: Alexis' Secret
programme.desc: Krystle beordrer Alexis om å forlate herskapshuset. Blake ber advokaten sin om å gjøre Steven arveløs. Claudia prøver å ta selvmord. Alexis forteller Steven at han er Blakes eneste barn.

programme.title: Dynasty: Fallon's Father
programme.desc: Alexis forteller Cecil Colby at Fallon er datteren hans. Blake og Steven oppfordres til å skvære opp. Dr. Toscanni trekker en bevisstløs Steven opp av bassenget og sender ham på sykehuset i all hast.

programme.title: Dynasty: Reconciliation
programme.desc: Steven vender tilbake til herskapshuset for å komme seg etter skadene han fikk da han falt. Krystles niese, Sammy Jo, kommer for å tilbringe noen uker hos Carrigton-familien.

programme.title: Dynasty: Viva Las Vegas
programme.desc: Nick forteller søsteren sin at Blake har skylden for at broren deres døde. Sammy Jo og Steven tilbringer natten sammen. Alexis skyter på Krystles hest.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Miscarriage
programme.desc: Krystle mister babyen. Steven og Sammy Jo begynner å date, selv om Steven er forelsket i Claudia. Fallon fortsetter forholdet med Nick, og blir sjalu når hun oppdager at han besøker Krystle på sykehuset.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Mid-East Meeting
programme.desc: Fallon finner ut at hun er gravid, og forteller Jeff at hun skal ta abort. Han går med på å skille seg, men bare hvis hun beholder barnet. Krystle sørger fortsatt over tapet av babyen.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Psychiatrist
programme.desc: Alexis lurer Blake til å komme til Roma og narrer ham i en felle ved å leie en snikfotograf til å ta suspekte bilder av dem. Jeff bønnfaller Fallon om å ikke ta abort.

programme.title: Dynasty: Sammy Jo and Steven Marry
programme.desc: Nick forteller Krystle at han elsker henne. Steven og Sammy Jo gifter seg. Fallon avlyser aborten. Etter skandalen forårsaket av paparazzibildene av Alexis og Blake, forlater Krystle Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Car Explosion
programme.desc: Nick overtaler Krystle til å gå fra Blake. Steven og Sammy Jo kunngjør at de er gift. Blake angripes av gangstere og blir blindet når bilen hans bombes.

programme.title: Dynasty: Blake's Blindness
programme.desc: Blake er fortsatt blind etter eksplosjonen. Nick ber Krystle om å skille seg fra ektemannen og gifte seg med ham. Blake graver i Nicks fortid. Alexis er fast bestemt på å fordrive Krystle fra Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Hearing
programme.desc: Fallon forteller Nick at hun elsker ham, men han er interessert i Krystle. Blakes forsøk på å stille Logan Rhinewood for retten mislykkes.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Iago Syndrome
programme.desc: Krystle tar farvel med Nick og forlater Denver. Blake tilbyr seg å adoptere Jeff. Cecil utsetter Claudia for utpressing. Nick godtar Blakes forklaring av brorens død.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Party
programme.desc: På en fest til ære for Sammy Jo, flauer Sammy Jo ut Carrington-familien og forteller Fallon at Blake ikke er faren hennes. Jeff forlater festen sammen med Claudia. Blake forteller Krystle at han kan se igjen.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Baby
programme.desc: Fallon får en sønn. Alexis tilbyr Sammy Jo $25 000 å forlate Denver. Jeff og Claudia ligger sammen. Krystle anklager Alexis for å ha myrdet babyen. Alexis får vite at Krystle og Blake ikke er lovformelig gift.

programme.title: Dynasty: Mother And Son
programme.desc: Da hun finner ut at han ikke er hennes egentlige far, nekter Fallon å møte Blake. Jeff forelsker seg i Claudia, som blir tatt i å stjele fra Denver-Carrington. Claudias ektemann og datter antas å være død.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Gun
programme.desc: En blodprøve viser at Blake er Fallons far. Steven reiser til Hollywood på leting etter kona. Claudia får vite at ektemannen og datteren antas å være død.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Fragment
programme.desc: Claudia legges inn på sykehus etter skytehendelsen. Krystle dras inn i saken. Logan Rhinewood fortsetter å kjøpe opp Devner-Carrington. Cecil frir til Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Shakedown
programme.desc: Claudia er fortsatt forvirret etter ulykken. Jeff oppfordrer Fallon til å skvære opp. Steven blir utpresset av en ung omstreifer.
